full_text:
Zhai Yuan
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhai Yuan. Urged Cao Ren to go on the attack against Guan Yu, lured into an ambush and cut down by Guan Ping. Zhai Yuan is a fictional character. Zhai Yuan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zhai Yuan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
